creator: ronald-lists@klop.ws
text:
The unifi5 port is updated to 5.10.19 lately. So this PR is outdated.
But there is a 5.10.20 released in the meantime also.

https://community.ubnt.com/t5/UniFi-Updates-Blog/UniFi-Network-Controller-5-10-20-Stable-has-been-released/ba-p/2713745

As it is releases so quick after 5.10.19 I guess it has some 'last minute' fixes.
